name: What's workers' comp vs suing for work slip in Idaho?
description: Comp quicker/no-fault; suits for pain if third-party.

mainEntity.name: What's workers' comp vs suing for work slip in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp quicker/no-fault; suits for pain if third-party.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Comp: no-fault, medical/wages only; suing third-party: fault-based, full damages including pain.** Exclusive for employer.[1][5] Key factors: Comp faster, no trial. Suits higher but riskier. 50% fault bar. Both possible. Lawyer advises best path.
